title: Endocrinology results follow-up visit
description: Results follow-up documented in Dallas Endocrinology for adrenal insufficiency, ALD, status post allogeneic bone marrow transplant, and X-linked adrenoleukodystrophy.

title: Hydrocortisone dose increased after elevated ACTH and renin
description: Provider documented that ACTH remained high after stress dosing and renin was elevated, and increased baseline hydrocortisone to 10 mg in the morning while continuing 7.5 mg in the afternoon and evening.

title: Fludrocortisone increased to 0.1 mg daily
description: Provider increased fludrocortisone dose to 0.1 mg daily.

title: Repeat lytes, ACTH, and renin planned in 4 weeks
description: Provider planned repeat electrolytes, ACTH, and renin testing in 4 weeks.

title: Mother reported fatigue, color changes, dry lips, and thirst
description: Nursing note documented that the patient's mother reported he was very tired, had rapid color changes, dry lips, and thirst, and that recommendations would be sent through MyChart.

title: MyChart guidance sent to family
description: Family was told the patient could increase the new morning hydrocortisone dose to 4 pills and to contact the oncology team or go to the ER if symptoms persisted.

title: Interpreter phone call completed with mother
description: Nurse documented a Dari interpreter call with the patient's mother to review provider recommendations, and the parent verbalized understanding and agreed with the plan.
